steps.t: Colbert the Mad is at Mincham's Camp at the south-west edge of the Fields of Fornost. You should introduce yourself to Colbert the Mad.
Mincham is at Mincham's Camp at the south-west edge of the Fields of Fornost. You should speak with Mincham.
Idhremmin is at Mincham's Camp at the south-west edge of the Fields of Fornost. You should introduce yourself to Idhremmin.
